rules.name: valid_iso4217_currency
rules.description: ISO 4217 3-letter currency code. Used on price_currency.

rules.name: valid_positive_int
rules.description: Non-negative integer. Used on price_amount_cents + jersey_number_*.

rules.name: valid_enrollment_status_transition
rules.description: Enforces the state-machine from x-invariants. Valid transitions: submitted → {payment_pending, consent_pending, confirmed, waitlisted, expired}; payment_pending → {consent_pending, confirmed, expired}; consent_pending → {confirmed, expired}; confirmed → {active, expired}; active → {completed, withdrawn, expelled}; waitlisted → {submitted (promotion), expired}. Refuses any other transition.
rules.default_message: The enrollment status transition from :from to :to is not allowed.

rules.name: valid_enrollment_type
rules.description: Enforces enrollment_type enum + cross-field: trial_converted requires source_trial_id; provisional requires the entitlement.
rules.default_message: The enrollment type is not valid or its prerequisites are not met.

rules.name: athlete_active_or_paused
rules.description: Refuses when the referenced Athlete.status NOT IN ('active', 'paused'). Withdrawn / graduated / archived athletes cannot enroll.
rules.default_message: The athlete must be active or paused to enroll.

rules.name: team_active
rules.default_message: The team must be active for enrollment.

rules.name: season_registration_open
rules.description: Refuses when Season.status NOT IN ('registration_open', 'in_progress'). Enrollments during in_progress become 'late' type (with a fee, tenant-configurable).
rules.default_message: Registration for this season is not open.

rules.name: age_group_snapshot_matches_team_age_group
rules.description: SOFT-WARN. Fires EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotMismatched when the snapshot doesn't match team.age_group_id. Does NOT block submission — many tenants allow athletes to play up (e.g. U10 playing on U12 team). Playing DOWN typically disallowed but tenant-configurable.
rules.default_message: The athlete's age group does not match the team's age group. This may be an intentional play-up but has been flagged.

rules.name: one_active_enrollment_per_athlete_team_season
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index. One active enrollment per (athlete, team, season).
rules.default_message: This athlete already has an active enrollment on this team for this season.

rules.name: team_has_capacity
rules.description: Checks team.capacity vs current active enrollment count. When at capacity + waitlist entitlement off, refuses; when at capacity + waitlist entitlement on, transitions to waitlisted state (not a refusal).
rules.default_message: The team is at capacity and waitlist is not enabled for this tenant.

rules.name: provisional_requires_entitlement
rules.description: Refuses enrollment_type='provisional' when tenant lacks athlete_enrollment_provisional entitlement.

rules.name: trial_source_matches_team_and_season
rules.description: Refuses when source_trial_id references a TeamTrial with a different team_id OR when the trial's status is not 'converted'.
rules.default_message: The trial source does not match this enrollment's team, or the trial is not in a converted state.

rules.name: consent_snapshot_present_when_confirmed
rules.description: Refuses status → confirmed when consent_snapshot is null OR when required consents (based on athlete's minor status + tenant's required consent set) are not present in the snapshot.
rules.default_message: Consent snapshot is required at confirmation. Ensure the athlete's consents are recorded before confirming enrollment.
